code: import axios from"axios";import{API_URL}from"../constants/baseUrl";var login=function login(username,password){return axios.post(API_URL+"auth/login",{username:username,password:password,role:"admin"}).then(function(response){if(response.data.accessToken){localStorage.setItem("user",JSON.stringify(response.data));}return response.data;}).catch(function(error){console.log("in axious catch",error);return error;});};var logout=function logout(){localStorage.removeItem("user");};var authService={login:login,logout:logout};export default authService;
